prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement SASL broker-side authentication: the SASL server authenticator, the mechanism selection (PLAIN, GSSAPI, SCRAM), and the authentication context lifecycle.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement SASL broker-side authentication: the SASL server authenticator, the mechanism selection (PLAIN, GSSAPI, SCRAM), and the authentication context lifecycle.
